title: Cartago, CA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Cartago is a city in CA with a population of 200,000. Costa Rica’s former capital, a historic city with the famous Basilica of Our Lady of the Angels and nearby volcanic landscapes.
